name: Courier
description: Monitor Courier notification infrastructure for routing policies and delivery compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Courier at https://app.courier.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your Production API Key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Courier Settings → API Keys (Production key)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Courier workspace members with access to notification routing
